title: Fix authentication flow: replace broken custom auth buttons with Internet Identity default popup

requirements.summary: Replace RegisterPage Step 2 custom authentication buttons with a single Internet Identity button
acceptanceCriteria: Step 2 shows a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button (not Google/Apple/Microsoft/Passkey separate buttons)
Button is always enabled and clickable when Step 2 is rendered — no stuck 'Connecting...' state on load
Clicking the button triggers the Internet Identity native popup directly via the useInternetIdentity login() function
No stale error message ('Authentication cancelled or failed') is shown when arriving at Step 2
If authentication fails or is cancelled, an error message is shown but the button resets to clickable state immediately

file_operations.description: Remove the AuthMethodButtons component and its import from Step 2 ('Authenticate' step). Replace with a single button labeled 'Connect with Internet Identity' that directly calls the login() function from the useInternetIdentity hook. Clear any stuck loading state (authLoading, authError) when the component mounts or when Step 2 is entered, ensuring the button is always clickable. Remove the persistent 'Authentication cancelled or failed. Please try again.' error display. Handle authentication errors inline by showing them temporarily and resetting the button to a clickable state immediately after an error. Ensure that after successful authentication, the existing profile registration and redirect logic continues to work as before.

requirements.summary: Replace LoginPage custom authentication buttons with a single Internet Identity button
acceptanceCriteria: LoginPage shows a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button replacing the Google/Apple/Microsoft/Passkey buttons
The button is immediately clickable on page load with no disabled or stuck state
Clicking the button opens Internet Identity's native popup directly
After successful authentication, the existing profile-fetch and redirect logic runs as before
The AuthMethodButtons component is no longer used on LoginPage

file_operations.description: Remove the AuthMethodButtons component and its import. Remove the 'CHOOSE METHOD' UI section. Replace with a single button labeled 'Connect with Internet Identity' that directly calls the login() function from the useInternetIdentity hook. Ensure the button is fully clickable and functional on initial render with no disabled or non-interactive state. After successful authentication, preserve the existing logic that fetches the user profile via getCallerUserProfile() and redirects to the player dashboard. Handle authentication errors gracefully by displaying them to the user without leaving the button in a stuck state.
